dvids.title: U.S. Forces Start Mine Clearance Mission in Strait of Hormuz
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces began setting conditions for clearing mines in the Strait of Hormuz, April 11, as two U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers conducted operations.
